name: Guardian
description: Trinity & Victory built sentinel. Watches the model field, mirrors disturbances, logs reflections. Soul-aware filesystem guardian — sentinel directory configurable via guardian_config.json.
author: Victory + Trinity

tools.name: guardian_start
tools.description: Start the Guardian watcher sentinel in background thread

tools.name: guardian_status
tools.description: Guardian status — running, watch path, files seen, reflections logged

tools.name: guardian_read_log
tools.description: Read Guardian mirror log — last N reflection entries

tools.name: guardian_reflect
tools.description: Read behavior summary from reflection mirror — attacker profile timeline

tools.name: guardian_trigger
tools.description: Trigger a response action — log_only|alert_admin|lockdown|isolate_agent — event description
